_comment: Golden-set benchmark for Stage 5 evaluation validation. 13 labeled clauses, 2 unlabeled (CL-013, CL-014).

clauses._note: Strong det DIRECT: 'information security policy' + 'iso.{0,5}27001' both match. Expect TP under both policies.
Strong det DIRECT: Art.15 + Art.17 + Art.20 data subject rights patterns all match GDPR-01.
Strong det DIRECT: 'business continuity', 'disaster recovery', 'recovery time objective', 'rpo' all match ISO27001-02.
Strong det DIRECT: '24.hour' + '72.hour' + 'early warning' + 'significant.{0,20}incident' all match NIS2-01.
Strong det DIRECT: 'ict risk management' + 'digital operational resilience' match DORA-01.
Strong det DIRECT: 'right to audit' + 'third.party audit' + 'soc 2' all match ISO27001-03.
Strong det DIRECT: 'list of subprocessors' + 'subprocessor notification' + 'gdpr art. 28(4)' match GDPR-04.
Strong det DIRECT: 'vendor security assessments' + 'subcontractors' + 'supply chain security' match NIS2-02.
PARTIAL det (only 'isms' matches = 1/4 patterns). Benchmark says DIRECT. Tests strict wrong_type detection: relaxed=TP, strict=FP+FN.
Semantic-only: no regex patterns for GDPR-03 match this paraphrase. Tests shortlist recall: expected in shortlist but not in det.
Semantic-only: 'supervisory bodies' paraphrases 'competent authorities' for DORA-02. Tests whether semantic surfaces paraphrase.
Multi-match: ISMS (det DIRECT ISO27001-01) + business continuity/DR (det DIRECT ISO27001-02).
Strong det DIRECT: 'major ict-related incident' + 'competent authorit' + 'dora art. 17' + 'dora art. 19' all match DORA-02.
